task_description: Remove RevenueCat SDK and wiring from the Paywall screen and implement Adapty subscriptions using the existing custom paywall screen. Install react-native-adapty and adaptyui-react-native, configure Expo plugins, create an Adapty client wrapper, rewrite PaywallScreen and StandalonePaywall to use Adapty placement 'main_paywall', update AuthGate to check 'pro_journal' entitlement, and clean up all RevenueCat references.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes (tsc --noEmit). Only pre-existing errors in unrelated files (16 total). No errors in any migrated files. All acceptance criteria verified: no revenuecatClient or react-native-purchases references remain in src/, Adapty SDK integration is complete with logShowPaywall call, app.json has react-native-adapty plugin, package.json has react-native-adapty and no RevenueCat packages.
